zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Leveson於1385年出生在英國斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓時，他的父親Richard Leveson23歲，母親Joanna DeRushall3歲。他於1429年與Lady Maude De Prestwood在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1459年9月1日在英國斯塔福爾普雷斯特武德享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Leveson于1385年出生在英国斯塔福爾沃爾維哈普頓时，他的父亲Richard Leveson23岁，母亲Joanna DeRushall3岁。他于1429年与Lady Maude De Prestwood在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1459年9月1日在英国斯塔福爾普雷斯特武德享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leveson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu).

variants.name: Levison
meanings: English: variant of Leveson, from the Middle English personal name Leveson, Loveson (Old English Lēofsunu, from lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + sunu ‘son’).

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: Leverson
meanings: Altered form of Jewish   Levison   or   Levinson  .

variants.name: Lowson
meanings: 1 English, Scottish: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Low, a pet form of Laurence ( see Lawrence ) + -son. Compare Lawson , Larson , and Lorrison .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Leveson was born in 1385, in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, his father, Richard Leveson, was 23 and his mother, Joanna DeRushall, was 3. He married Lady Maude De Prestwood in 1429, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 1 September 1459, in Prestwood, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Leveson est né en 1385, à Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Leveson, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joanna DeRushall, avait 3 ans. Il a épousé Lady Maude De Prestwood en 1429, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1459, à Prestwood, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Leveson 1385 in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Leveson 23 und seine Mutter Joanna DeRushall 3. Er hat 1429 in Staffordshire, England Lady Maude De Prestwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 1. September 1459 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Prestwood, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Leveson è nato il nel 1385 nel Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Leveson, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Joanna DeRushall, aveva 3 anni. Lui sposato Lady Maude De Prestwood nel 1429, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 1 settembre 1459, nel Prestwood, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Levesonが1385年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウオルバーハンプトンで生まれた時，父Richard Levesonは23歳，母Joanna DeRushallは3歳であった。1429年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでLady Maude De Prestwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1459年9月1日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアプレストウッドで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Leveson(이)가 1385년 영국 스태퍼드실르 울버함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Leveson(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna DeRushall(은)는 3세였다. 그는 1429년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Lady Maude De Prestwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1459년 9월 1일 영국 스태퍼드실르 프레스트우드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Leveson nasceu em 1385, em Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Leveson, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joanna DeRushall, tinha 3 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Maude De Prestwood em 1429, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1459, em Prestwood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Leveson родился в 1385 г. в местности волвирамптон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Leveson было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna DeRushall, 3. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Maude De Prestwood в 1429 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 1 сентября 1459 г. в местности прествуд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Leveson nació en 1385, en Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Leveson, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joanna DeRushall, tenía 3 años. Se casó con Lady Maude De Prestwood en 1429, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1459, en Prestwood, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
